mnemonics: Marketing = Measuring, Not Predicting (Traditional Business Intelligence)
Big Data = Big Insights (Big Data Analytics)
keyPoints: Traditional Business Intelligence focuses on historical data analysis to measure past performance and predict future trends.
Big Data Analytics involves collecting, processing, and analyzing large, diverse, and complex data sets to gain insights and make data-driven decisions.
Traditional Business Intelligence is limited by its reliance on structured data and traditional data analysis techniques, while Big Data Analytics can handle unstructured and semi-structured data.
